channel.title: Urban Gardening Daily
channel.description: Fresh takes for apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners.

item.title: Double Your Yield: Expert Vertical Gardening Strategies
item.description: Grow more with less space

item.title: Ask the forge: your seasonal questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the seasonal questions apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in composting with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest composting adjustments that apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: small space vegetables
item.description: The persistent myths around small space vegetables, stress-tested against what apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your containers in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying containers project for apartment dwellers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about indoor herb garden through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.
